twitter_thread: 1 out of 4 software stocks is beating expectations with 25% quarterly revenue growth, driven by AI
NVIDIA's cuDNN and TensorRT tools fueled 50% YoY growth in their software segment, a $1.5B revenue increase
A 10% boost in AI compute usage can add $10m to quarterly revenues, as seen in Alphabet's Q2 earnings
Software stocks with 20%+ R&D spend outperform peers by 15%, examples include Microsoft and Amazon
Legacy AI solutions are being disrupted: 60% of IBM's AI revenue comes from cloud-native services
What's your strategy for investing in software stocks during AI hype cycles? #aistocks #softwareinvesting
